name: Angel Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg whites until foamy. Gradually add the cream of tartar, then beat until the mixture holds stiff peaks.
2. Gradually add the sugar, vanilla, and chopped nuts to the beaten egg whites.
3. Gently fold in the graham cracker crumbs.
4. Pour the batter into a lightly buttered pie plate.
5. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 35 minutes.
6. Allow the pie to cool before serving with Cool Whip or ice cream.
